team.name: James Anderson
team.bio: Founder of Apex Home Builders with over 30 years in residential construction. James started as a carpenter and built the company on principles of quality craftsmanship and customer care.

team.name: Sarah Mitchell
team.bio: Award-winning architect with 20 years of experience designing Australian homes. Sarah leads our design team, ensuring every home is both beautiful and functional.

team.name: Michael Roberts
team.bio: Licensed builder with expertise in project management and quality control. Michael oversees all construction projects to ensure they meet Apex standards.

team.name: Emily Chen
team.bio: Emily ensures every client feels supported throughout their build journey. With a background in customer service, she's your point of contact for all updates and questions.

team.name: David Wilson
team.bio: David's detailed quotes ensure there are no surprises. He works closely with clients to understand their budget and finds solutions that maximise value.

team.name: Lisa Park
team.bio: Lisa helps clients create interiors that reflect their personality and lifestyle. From material selection to colour palettes, she makes the finishing touches perfect.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: We never compromise on materials or workmanship. Every home we build is crafted to last generations.

values.title: Transparent Communication
values.description: From initial quote to final handover, we keep you informed with honest, clear updates on your project.

values.title: Client-Focused
values.description: Your home should reflect your lifestyle. We listen, adapt, and deliver homes that truly suit your needs.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We do what we say. Our fixed-price contracts and realistic timelines mean no nasty surprises.
